offer: For insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients, missed policy renewals cause client dissatisfaction. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendars.
problem: Difficulty in tracking insurance policy renewals for multiple clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 insurance brokers with demo
Community forums for sharing tools among brokers
try_it: Let users try client notification system for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
